---
title: Local finite-amplitude wave activity as an objective diagnostic of midlatitude
  extreme weather
pagetitle: 2015-12-1-Chen2015 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2015
author: Gang Chen, Jian Lu, D. Alex Burrows and L. Ruby Leung
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 42, 10,952--10,960, doi:10.1002/2015GL066959.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, Jian Lu, D. Alex Burrows and L. Ruby Leung, 2015:
  Local finite-amplitude wave activity as an objective diagnostic of midlatitude extreme
  weather, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 42, 10,952--10,960, doi:10.1002/2015GL066959.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2015GL066959
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Local finite-amplitude wave activity as an objective diagnostic of midlatitude extreme weather

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2015*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, Jian Lu, D. Alex Burrows and L. Ruby Leung, 2015: Local finite-amplitude wave activity as an objective diagnostic of midlatitude extreme weather, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 42, 10,952--10,960, doi:10.1002/2015GL066959.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2015GL066959){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
